text.title: PM Certification Changes 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (exam_date, prep_material_age, candidate_profile) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: ECO 2021 applies; use prior-version prep materials

text.example: exam_date_after_2026_07_01=true → apply ECO 2026 changes report (rule effective-date-cited).
